scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../worker && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset
